name: Grandma Burdick's Sour Cream Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar, eggs, and shortening together until smooth.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the sour cream, baking soda, and vanilla extract.
3. Add the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, and salt) to the wet mixture in three additions, stirring well after each addition.
4. Scoop heaping tablespoonfuls of dough onto a greased baking sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F for 8 to 12 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
6. For variety, stir in chocolate chips, raisins, or nuts before placing the cookies on the baking sheet.
7. To make rolled cookies, mix an additional cup of flour into the dough, shape it into a log, wrap in plastic wrap, and refrigerate for 30 minutes to an hour. Roll out the chilled dough and cut into desired shapes before baking as directed above.
